Starting foundational domain and config model work for the vector index.
Codegraph discovery and task/HUD review confirmed the domain/config model scope.
Domain models will use typed Path, Enum, and freshness validators; package exports will re-export the new index domain types.

Starting extractor implementation for Python and markdown content units.
Codegraph discovery found existing markdown/path-handling conventions and no extractor package yet.
Extractor design will reuse typed domain records, local path normalization, and skip logic for excluded or generated paths.
Extractor logic uses local-only paths, built-in exclusions, and no external dependencies.
Python symbols and markdown sections are normalized into hash-bearing content units with provenance.

Starting vector store and service orchestration for the local index.
Codegraph discovery surfaced the existing health/recovery snapshot pattern and run-scoped logging pattern to reuse.
Store/service orchestration will stage snapshot writes, swap atomically, and report status using the existing freshness semantics.
Store/service orchestration stays local-only, path-bound, and snapshot-safe under the repo root.
Build, query, refresh, and status run through the shared service with atomic snapshot preservation.
tests/unit/test_vector_index_package.py, test_vector_index_domain.py, test_vector_index_extractors.py, and test_vector_index_service.py passed.
